answer:
\boxed{B}

The most suitable option for **different places, same time** conditions in knowledge sharing is **peer-to-peer shared computer**, as it allows real-time collaboration (e.g., co-editing documents or shared screens) without requiring physical presence. While video conferencing (D) also fits this scenario, it lacks the direct, interactive file-sharing capability of a shared computer. Face-to-face (A) and email (C) do not meet the "same time" requirement.
